case_title: RUBEN TORRES VS. VIKING SERVICES CORPORATION DBA WEST COAST PROPERT

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-08-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VIKING SERVICES CORPORATION DBA WEST COAST PROPERT Y MANAGEMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TORRES, RUBEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIKING SERVICES CORPORATION DBA WEST COAST PROPERT Y MANAGEMENT $456.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $516.00, PLAINTIFF MAY CASH THE TWO CHECKS PREVIOUSLY TENDERED BY DEFENDANT, AND DEFENDANT SHSALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT FOR THOSE PAYMENTS.
